basic_details.job_title: Civil Surgeon Office Ranchi Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Civil Surgeon Office Ranchi has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 3 Medical Officer (Part-Time) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Civil Surgeon Office Ranchi office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 67 years Maximum Age: 70 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from a recognized institution, Valid registration with Medical Council
qualification.details: MBBS degree from a recognized institution with valid registration with Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Rs. 36,400/- per month for 26 working days (Rs. 1,400/- per day)

all_official_links.label: Download Civil Surgeon Office Ranchi Medical Officer (Part-Time) Job 2026 Notifi

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) post at the Civil Surgeon Office Ranchi is scheduled for 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to be present at the venue with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) position, candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized institution and hold a valid registration with the Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the Medical Officer (Part-Time) role?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) post is between a minimum of 67 years and a maximum of 70 years. There are no specific age relaxations mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) position announced by the Civil Surgeon Office Ranchi.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) post will receive a salary of Rs. 36,400/- per month, which is equivalent to Rs. 1,400/- per day for 26 working days.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) recruitment at the Civil Surgeon Office Ranchi.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) recruitment will involve an Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an official website mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The provided data does not include a specific official website for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any further details or updates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job for the Medical Officer (Part-Time) post?
faq.answer: The Medical Officer (Part-Time) position at the Civil Surgeon Office Ranchi is a contractual job.
